incidents.headline: Road damage report — accidente Vía Centenario
incidents.recommended_action: ⚡ PRIORITY VISIT — Inspect Vía Centenario within 24hrs. 3/5 sources confirmed. Bring 3-5 boxes PowerPatch.
incidents.sv_description: The road surface shows visible cracks and patched repairs but no clear pothole with a distinct depression or hole is visible. Image 1 (Norte) shows what appears to be a patched area on the concrete road surface, but this is a repair rather than an active pothole. The road surface appears to be concrete with some wear patterns and minor surface irregularities, but no obvious dangerous cavity that would cause an accident.

incidents.headline: Road damage report — accidente Corredor Norte
incidents.recommended_action: ⚡ PRIORITY VISIT — Inspect Corredor Norte within 24hrs. 4/5 sources confirmed. Bring 3-5 boxes PowerPatch.
incidents.sv_description: The road surface on Corredor Norte appears to be in good condition with smooth concrete pavement visible across all directional views. No potholes, depressions, or missing sections of road surface are clearly visible in any of the five images provided. The highway shows typical modern elevated toll road construction with concrete barriers and well-maintained lanes.

incidents.headline: Road damage report — accidente Transístmica
incidents.recommended_action: 🚨 IMMEDIATE DEPLOYMENT — PowerPatch to Transístmica. Visual confirms moderate damage (0.4m Ø). Estimated 1 boxes needed. Contact MOP/ATTT.
incidents.sv_description: In Image 1 (Norte), there is visible road surface deterioration at the curved intersection area near the orange construction fencing. The pavement shows clear signs of degradation with uneven surfaces and what appears to be a depression or damaged section at the curb/road junction where vehicles turn. The road surface in this turning area shows wear patterns consistent with pothole formation that could cause vehicle instability.

incidents.headline: Road damage report — hueco bache accidente
incidents.recommended_action: ⚡ PRIORITY VISIT — Inspect Panamá within 24hrs. 3/5 sources confirmed. Bring 3-5 boxes PowerPatch.
